description: You only have one chance to make a good first impression, so if you want to look smart, the lino perros Handbag Collection provides you with a superb array of ideas. The bags are all spacious, with multiple compartments and pockets allowing you to carry a lot more, and still be well organised. The collection is characterised by exciting design elements that break the monotony & make the bags more fun! Height: 12 cm Width: 15 cm Depth: 7 cm Made of synthetic leather for durability Has one zippered compartment with one inner zipper, a zippered seperator and organiser sleeve for a mobile and essentials Two short straps, one short removable strap and a long strap for carrying ease and style Brand name appliqué d on the front Two short twilltape handles at the back for carrying ease and style One zippered pocket at the back for additional space Care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
